predicate.title: First governed change: prove the G4 loop end-to-end
predicate.problem: The G4 gate, evidence predicates, and GitHub binding all exist but no real change has ever flowed through them; until one does, the walking skeleton's exit criterion (a PR without valid evidence cannot merge, and the evidence trail is reconstructable) is unproven.
acceptance_criteria: This PR's g4-gate check denies while any required evidence is missing (observed before approval)
After '/asdlc approve <head-sha>' by a bound release-approver, the gate re-evaluates and passes
The merged change's evidence bundle (intent, classification, verdicts, approval) is retrievable from the run artifact
PURPOSE.md records the loop as proven
out_of_scope: Signature verification (dev-unsigned mode is the documented v0.1 stand-in)
Making g4-gate a required check (immediately follows this proof)
